tabs.content:
// ============================================================
// Atlas v1.1.0 — Massive Futures Streaming Validation Queries
// Table: raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
// ============================================================


// 1. Latest events
raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
| extend fabric_ingested_utc = ingestion_time()
| order by fabric_ingested_utc desc
| take 20;


// 2. Duplicate Atlas event IDs
raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
| summarize row_count = count() by atlas_event_id
| where row_count > 1
| order by row_count desc;


// 3. Minute continuity
raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
| where atlas_event_id != "massive|AM|MESU6|1783932120000"
| order by event_start_utc asc
| serialize
| extend previous_event_start_utc = prev(event_start_utc)
| extend gap_seconds = datetime_diff(
    "second",
    event_start_utc,
    previous_event_start_utc
)
| project
    event_start_utc,
    previous_event_start_utc,
    gap_seconds,
    atlas_event_id;


// 4. OHLC and non-negative measure validation
raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
| where
    high_price < open_price
    or high_price < close_price
    or high_price < low_price
    or low_price > open_price
    or low_price > close_price
    or volume < 0
    or event_count < 0
    or dollar_volume < 0
| project
    event_start_utc,
    symbol,
    open_price,
    high_price,
    low_price,
    close_price,
    volume,
    event_count,
    dollar_volume,
    atlas_event_id;


// 5. Latency profile
raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
| extend fabric_ingested_utc = ingestion_time()
| extend
    feed_delay_seconds = datetime_diff(
        "millisecond",
        atlas_received_utc,
        event_end_utc
    ) / 1000.0,
    fabric_ingestion_seconds = datetime_diff(
        "millisecond",
        fabric_ingested_utc,
        atlas_received_utc
    ) / 1000.0,
    end_to_end_seconds = datetime_diff(
        "millisecond",
        fabric_ingested_utc,
        event_end_utc
    ) / 1000.0
| where atlas_event_id != "massive|AM|MESU6|1783932120000"
| summarize
    event_count = count(),
    average_feed_delay_seconds = avg(feed_delay_seconds),
    minimum_feed_delay_seconds = min(feed_delay_seconds),
    maximum_feed_delay_seconds = max(feed_delay_seconds),
    average_fabric_ingestion_seconds = avg(fabric_ingestion_seconds),
    minimum_fabric_ingestion_seconds = min(fabric_ingestion_seconds),
    maximum_fabric_ingestion_seconds = max(fabric_ingestion_seconds),
    average_end_to_end_seconds = avg(end_to_end_seconds)
    by symbol
tabs.title: Massive Futures Streaming Validation

tabs.content:
raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
| extend fabric_ingested_utc = ingestion_time()
| extend
    feed_delay_seconds = datetime_diff(
        "millisecond",
        atlas_received_utc,
        event_end_utc
    ) / 1000.0,
    fabric_ingestion_seconds = datetime_diff(
        "millisecond",
        fabric_ingested_utc,
        atlas_received_utc
    ) / 1000.0
| where atlas_event_id != "massive|AM|MESU6|1783932120000"
| order by event_start_utc desc
| project
    event_start_utc,
    symbol,
    open_price,
    high_price,
    low_price,
    close_price,
    volume,
    event_count,
    feed_delay_seconds,
    fabric_ingestion_seconds,
    fabric_ingested_utc
| take 50
tabs.title: Massive Futures Market Monitoring

tabs.content:
raw_massive_futures_minute_aggregates
| where atlas_event_id != "massive|AM|MESU6|1783932120000"
| where event_start_utc >= ago(1h)
| order by event_start_utc asc
| project
    event_start_utc,
    symbol,
    open_price,
    high_price,
    low_price,
    close_price,
    volume,
    event_count
tabs.title: Massive Futures Dashboard Source
